title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally with Docker-like UX.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API, published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, available on PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, and tool callers.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for any Ollama model, self-hostable with Docker.

title: ollama-cli-copilot
summary: Lightweight CLI coding assistant that pipes context into Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation repo showing how to combine Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-curated recipes for common Ollama patterns: tool use, structured output, fine-tune, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama (Maven Central: ollama4j) supporting streaming chat and embeddings.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that registers Ollama models as both generators and embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to invoke Ollama models inside no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an ‘Ask Ollama’ command to summarize or query notes using local models.

title: ollama-sd-webui
summary: Extension for AUTOMATIC1111 Stable-Diffusion-WebUI that pipes LLM prompts through Ollama for dynamic prompt generation.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate (crates.io: ollama-rs) providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Unofficial Elixir wrapper (Hex: ollama) for chatting and embedding with Ollama in OTP applications.

title: ollama-helm-chart
summary: Alternative community Helm chart focused on single-node home-lab deployments with PVC model caching.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: Starter repo showing how to wrap Ollama with FastAPI for extra authentication, rate-limiting and OpenAI-style endpoints.

title: ollama-rustico
summary: Minimal Rust CLI tool that uses ollama-rs to stream completions with syntax highlighting and clipboard integration.
